zh.lifeSummary: 當Dionysia Stubbes於1560年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可瑟其福德時，她的父親Richard Stubbes14歲，母親Elizabeth Gurney13歲。她於1586年3月12日與Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet在英國英格蘭諾福爾可瑟其福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1625年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可盧加姆享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dionysia Stubbes于1560年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可瑟其福德时，她的父亲Richard Stubbes14岁，母亲Elizabeth Gurney13岁。她于1586年3月12日与Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet在英国英格兰諾福爾可瑟其福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1625年在英国英格兰諾福爾可盧加姆享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stubbes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Stubbe with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.
perhaps occasionally a topographic name from Middle English stub(be) ‘tree stump’ + hous ‘house’, used for someone who lived in a house by a tree stump.

variants.name: Stubbe
meanings: English, North German, and Dutch: from Old English stubb, Middle Low German, Middle Dutch stubbe ‘tree stump’ or ‘tree trunk’, hence a nickname for a short, stout man, or, alternatively, perhaps a topographic name for someone who lived on newly cleared land or by a tree stump.

variants.name: Stobbs
meanings: English (Durham and Northumberland): variant of   Stubbs  .

nameMeanings.name: Dionysia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Denise ; see Dennis . This form was in use in northern England from the 14th to the 17th century; the short form Dye is the source of the surname Dyson.

en.lifeSummary: When Dionysia Stubbes was born in 1560, in Sedgeford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Stubbes, was 14 and her mother, Elizabeth Gurney, was 13. She married Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet on 12 March 1586, in Sedgeford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1625, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dionysia Stubbes est née en 1560, à Sedgeford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Stubbes, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Gurney, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet le 12 mars 1586, à Sedgeford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1625, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dionysia Stubbes 1560 in Sedgeford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Stubbes 14 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Gurney 13. Sie hat am 12. März 1586 in Sedgeford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1625 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dionysia Stubbes è nata il nel 1560 nel Sedgeford, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard Stubbes, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Gurney, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet il 12 marzo 1586, nel Sedgeford, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1625, nel Rougham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dionysia Stubbesが1560年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクセジェフォードで生まれた時，父Richard Stubbesは14歳，母Elizabeth Gurneyは13歳であった。1586年3月12日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクセジェフォードでSir William Henry Yelverton Baronetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1625年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロウアムで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dionysia Stubbes(이)가 1560년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 세지퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Stubbes(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Gurney(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1586년 3월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 세지퍼드에서 Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1625년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 루그함에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dionysia Stubbes nasceu em 1560, em Sedgeford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Stubbes, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Gurney, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet em 12 de março de 1586, em Sedgeford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1625, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dionysia Stubbes родилась в 1560 г. в местности седжефорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Stubbes было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Gurney, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet 12 марта 1586 г. в местности седжефорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1625 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dionysia Stubbes nació en 1560, en Sedgeford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Stubbes, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Gurney, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet el 12 de marzo de 1586, en Sedgeford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1625, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años.
